subject: docs(audit): per-repo pattern gap audit against updated implementation docs
body:
Re-audited all 11 app repos against the 8 updated pattern docs. Built a
full gap matrix and persisted per-repo implementation gaps with specific
details. Identified 10 cross-cutting gaps appearing in 6+ repos.

Tags: documentation, audit, patterns, cross-repo
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
